_meta.description: Official IPC (Indian Penal Code, 1860) -> BNS (Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023) correspondence, parsed from the NCRB Corresponding Section Table.
_meta.transition_rule: Matters on or after 2024-07-01 fall under the BNS; earlier matters remain under the IPC.
_meta.verification_note: Mapping data is from the official NCRB Corresponding Section Table; 5 human clarifying note(s) merged from _curated_overlay.json.
